text.content:
Every MAXAM agricultural tire communicates vital information through precise tire markings on its sidewall.

Understanding these sidewall markings is crucial for selecting the right tire, ensuring proper inflation pressure, and maximizing performance with various implements. This comprehensive guide will help you interpret every marking on your tractor tire to optimize fuel efficiency, reduce soil compaction, and extend your farm tire's lifespan.
